amzn1.dv.gti.f5b53647-e608-46ed-8228-a60.synopsis: Private investigator Ben Reilly is hired on a couple of straightforward cases... until mobsters, monsters, and a mysterious femme fatale spin a web that brings him face to face with his former life as New York's only superhero: The Spider.

entities.synopsis: Season 1・FROM unravels the mystery of a nightmarish town that traps all those who enter. As the unwilling residents fight to keep a sense of normalcy and search for a way out, they must also survive the threats of the surrounding forest.
entities.title: FROM (TV) - Season 1

entities.synopsis: Season 1・A college soap based on Elle Kennedy's bestselling book series, the first season of OFF CAMPUS follows the unlikely romance between wry, hockey-hating music major Hannah Wells and Briar U's womanizing star center Garrett Graham as they strike a deal to help each other out. But will their deal unfold as expected?
entities.title: Off Campus - Season 1

entities.synopsis: Season 1・Ambitious Goldy joins Jumbolife and recruits Manoj; they rise fast building a network, but ego clashes split them and weaken both.
entities.title: The Pyramid Scheme - Season 1

entities.synopsis: Season 1・The Boys is an irreverent take on what happens when superheroes, who are as popular as celebrities, as influential as politicians and as revered as Gods, abuse their superpowers rather than use them for good. It’s the powerless against the super powerful as The Boys embark on a heroic quest to expose the truth about “The Seven,” and their formidable Vought backing.
entities.title: The Boys - Season 1

entities.displayTitle: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
entities.synopsis: In this new film, Jack Ryan is reluctantly pulled back into espionage when an international covert mission unravels a deadly conspiracy. Racing against time, he joins CIA allies Mike November and James Greer and sharp MI6 officer Emma Marlow to battle a rogue black-ops unit in a high-stakes, deeply personal fight.
entities.title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War

entities.synopsis: Season 1・Two young men chase impossible dreams in the ruthless world of real estate sales. Prashant, driven by love, longs to be a great actor, while Jimmy, fueled by vengeance, seeks to be Delhi’s richest man. Both are obsessive dreamers with opposite paths. When fate unites them, they clash with each other and a brutal world that spares no one who dares to dream.
entities.title: Sapne Vs Everyone - Season 1

entities.synopsis: Season 1・What if you lost your memory? What if a spy didn’t know they were a spy? Years ago, the top agents of Citadel, Mason Kane (Richard Madden) and Nadia Sinh (Priyanka Chopra Jonas), had their minds wiped. But, they’re called back to action as sinister forces emerge from the past. With the help of spymaster Bernard Orlick (Stanley Tucci), these former lovers must remember the past to save the future.
entities.title: Citadel - Season 1

focusMessage.message: Free trial of Sony Pictures - Stream or rent

entities.synopsis: Spider-Man faces several unwanted guests when a spell by Doctor Strange backfires.
entities.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home

entities.synopsis: Season 1・INVINCIBLE is an adult animated superhero series that revolves around 17-year-old Mark Grayson, who’s just like every other guy his age — except his father is the most powerful superhero on the planet, Omni-Man. But as Mark develops powers of his own, he discovers his father’s legacy may not be as heroic as it seems.
entities.title: INVINCIBLE – SEASON 1

entities.synopsis: Lucy's tropical island homecoming turns deadly when her family's clever chimp spirals into a savage rabid frenzy. With her father away and no help coming, paradise becomes a prison as she and her friends fight to survive a predator they once trusted.
entities.title: Primate

entities.synopsis: Marty Mauser, a young man with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.
entities.title: Marty Supreme

entities.synopsis: Crime 101 follows a master jewel thief (Chris Hemsworth) whose meticulous robberies along the 101 freeway in sun-bleached LA have confounded police. A lone detective (Mark Ruffalo) is on his tail. When their paths cross with a disillusioned insurance broker (Halle Berry), all three face choices that will define their fates in a deadly climax with millions of dollars at stake.
entities.title: Crime 101

entities.synopsis: Season 1・They're rowdy, they're ragtag, they're misfits turned mercenaries for hire. Vox Machina is more interested in easy money and cheap ale than actually protecting the realm. But when the kingdom is threatened by evil, this boisterous crew realizes that they are the only ones capable of restoring justice. What began as a simple payday is now the origin story behind Exandria’s newest heroes.
entities.title: The Legend of Vox Machina – Season 1

entities.synopsis: Season 1・Bound by tragedy and blood to a dangerous, otherworldly mission, two brothers travel in mysterious back roads of the country in their '67 Chevy Impala, searching for their missing father--and hunting down every evil supernatural force they encounter along the way. Bring home all 22 episodes of the first season of the thrilling new show, Supernatural along with must-own bonus features. Supernatu...
entities.title: Supernatural - Season 1

entities.synopsis: Season 1・When CIA analyst Jack Ryan stumbles upon a suspicious series of bank transfers his search for answers pulls him from the safety of his desk job and catapults him into a deadly game of cat and mouse throughout Europe and the Middle East, with a rising terrorist figurehead preparing for a massive attack against the US and her allies.
entities.title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan - Season 1

focusMessage.message: Subscribe to Prime Video, free trial of Sony Pictures - Stream, or rent

glanceMessage.message: Subscribe to Prime Video, free trial of Sony Pictures - Stream, or rent

entities.synopsis: A high school student with spider-like superpowers defends his city from a monstrous foe.
entities.title: The Amazing Spider-Man

entities.synopsis: Season 1・An intense, arduous and frequently hilarious year in the life of Britain’s most unlikely farmer, Jeremy Clarkson. Join Jeremy and his rag-tag band of agricultural associates as they face-up to a backdrop of unhelpful weather, disobedient animals, unresponsive crops and an unexpected pandemic. This is Jeremy Clarkson as you’ve never seen him before.
entities.title: Clarkson's Farm – Season 1

entities.synopsis: Season 1・When retired Military Police Officer Jack Reacher is arrested for a murder he did not commit, he finds himself in the middle of a deadly conspiracy. With nothing but his wits, he must figure out what is happening in Margrave, Georgia.
entities.title: REACHER (TV) - SEASON 01

entities.synopsis: Season 1・Based on one of the greatest video games of all time, Fallout is the story of haves and have-nots in a world in which there’s almost nothing left to have. 200 years after the apocalypse, the gentle denizens of luxury fallout shelters are forced to return to the incredibly complex, gleefully weird and highly violent universe waiting for them above.
entities.title: Fallout - Season 1

entities.synopsis: Are humans inherently good? Or evil? An old man gets no respect from his family or his colleagues. A freak accident with the aliens gifts him alien technology and transforms his body into a fighting machine with superhuman powers. A high school student present at the scene undergoes the same transformation and begins to use his super powers to hurt whoever crosses his path.
entities.title: Inuyashiki
